name: Chicken Normande with Apples and Cream
recipeIngredient: 2 tart apples, peeled, cored, and diced
recipeInstructions:
1. Season chicken with salt and pepper.
2. In a large frying pan, melt butter over medium heat.
3. Add shallots and garlic; sauté until soft.
4. Add chicken and saute about 5 minutes per side, until lightly browned.
5. Add wine and thyme; cover and simmer for 10 minutes.
6. Add apples; simmer an additional 10 minutes.
7. Preheat the broiler.
8. Transfer apples and chicken to a casserole dish.
9. In the frying pan, add any remaining liquid and cream; stir until it just comes to a boil.
10. Pour over chicken and sprinkle with cheese.
11. Broil until cheese is melted and bubbly.
